articles.title: New Research Challenges a Long-Held Myth About Colorado Moose
articles.description: Evidence from archaeology, archives and Indigenous knowledge shows moose have a much longer history in Colorado than modern reintroductions suggest. articles.title: Noskova holds her nerve to beat Muchova for first Wimbledon title
articles.description: Linda Noskova overcomes missing out on five Championship points in the second set, to defeat Karolina Muchova 6-2 5-7 6-3 to win her first Wimbledon title at 21 years old.

articles.title: Scientists Catch a “Jumping Gene” Moving Between Species
articles.description: A jumping gene was directly observed moving from predator to prey through circular RNA. Dead cells are usually molecular dead ends: their fragile RNA messages rapidly disappear, and no new genetic activity is expected. articles.description: After setting the music gear corner of the internet on fire back in 2023 with the first glimpse at the Nopia, creators Martin Grieco and Rocío Gal are almost ready to bring it to market. articles.title: Noskova, an astonishing Wimbledon fightback - and a kiss to the sky
articles.description: Linda Noskova produces "one of the all-time greatest efforts on Centre Court" to win Wimbledon - and thanks her late mother, Ivana, for inspiring her.

articles.title: Fitzpatrick shares lead at fog-disrupted Scottish Open
articles.description: Matt Fitzpatrick holds a share of the lead and out-of-sorts Rory McIlroy struggles in an unfinished third round at the Genesis Scottish Open where fog caused havoc.

articles.description: Oregon Attorney General Dan Rayfield had been seeking documents from Paramount related to its takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery. articles.title: England too good for India as Buttler hits 131
articles.description: Jos Buttler's sublime 131 and Harry Brook's unbeaten 95 help England crush India in the fifth T20 and replace their opponents at the top of the world rankings.

articles.title: New Study Rewrites the Story of How Humans Got Bigger
articles.description: Human body size evolution was shaped by both gradual change and a major later growth spurt within Homo. When did our ancestors become human-sized? articles.title: Just Two Hours of This Simple Exercise Habit a Week May Help You Live Longer
articles.description: Lifting weights for about one to two hours a week may support longer life, especially when combined with aerobic activity. articles.title: Eleven-try England thrash sorry Fiji to end losing run
